title: Brine-Dry Oven-Roasted Korean Peppers On The Raclette Grill
description: Sweet and tender Korean peppers brined, dried, and roasted on the raclette grill for a date-night dish. A delicious and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly meal to impress your partner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine 1 cup of water, 2 tsp of Korean chili flakes, 1 tsp of rice vinegar, 1 tsp of sugar, and 1 inch of ginger. Whisk until the sugar dissolves.
Add 4-6 Korean chili peppers to the bowl and let them marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread the marinated peppers on it.
Dry the peppers in the oven for 2-3 hours or until they reach a tender and slightly chewy texture.
Remove the peppers from the oven and let them cool down.
Heat 2 tbsp of coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 2 cloves of garlic and 1 tsp of black pepper to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
Add the dried peppers to the pan and stir for another minute.
Transfer the peppers to the raclette grill and roast them for 5-7 minutes or until they develop a nice char.
Serve the roasted peppers as a side dish or add them to your favorite Korean-inspired meals.
